testsuite.name: CS126Lab2Test

testcase.name: getMainOutputMilestone2()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <[] [A. N. Other] > but was: <List BEFORE adding: [] List AFTER adding: [A. N. Other] >

testcase.name: getMainOutputMilestone3()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <[] [A. N. Other] [A. N. Other, J. Doe] [J. Doe] > but was: <Initial list: [] After adding A. N. Other to head [A. N. Other] After adding J. Doe to tail: [A. N. Other, J. Doe] After removing from head: [J. Doe] >

testsuite.system-out:
List BEFORE adding: [] List AFTER adding: [A. N. Other]
Initial list: [] After adding A. N. Other to head [A. N. Other] After adding J. Doe to tail: [A. N. Other, J. Doe] After removing from head: [J. Doe]
